name: 24" Olivine Rounded Back Rattan Counter Height Barstool with Metal Legs and Footrest Natural - Threshold™
description:
This Olivine Rugged and Refined Boho Counter-Height Bar Stool from Threshold™ is perfect for pulling up to your kitchen island or home bar. Built on a black metal frame, this fixed-height bar stool features an oval, armless silhouette with a rattan-like seat and backrest with a breezy woven design. The natural brown hue lets it complement a range of decor styles, while the four tubular, splayed legs and circular footrest keep it standing properly poised.

Threshold™: Quality & Design / Casual classics for house and home.
